```py cloud/cloud/reporting/models.py
@dataclass
class _PriceAndCostEntry:
    cost_model: CostModel | UUID | None = None
    gross_price_no_vat: Money | None = None
    pv_price_no_vat: Money | None = None
    battery_price_no_vat: Money | None = None
    ev_charger_price_no_vat: Money | None = None
    cost_no_vat: Money | None = None
    cost_pv_no_vat: Money | None = None
    cost_battery_no_vat: Money | None = None
    cost_ev_charger_no_vat: Money | None = None
    markup_no_vat: Money | None = None
    partner_margin_no_vat: Money | None = None
    battery_leasing_num_terms: int | None = None
    battery_leasing_interest_basis_points: int | None = None
    battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat: Money | None = None
    pv_leasing_num_terms: int | None = None
    pv_leasing_interest_basis_points: int | None = None
    pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat: Money | None = None
    total_monthly_no_vat: Money | None = None
    cost_modification: Money | None = None
    normalized_buyout_price: Money | None = None
    normalized_pv_buyout_price: Money | None = None
    normalized_battery_buyout_price: Money | None = None
    discounted_leasing_months: int | None = None
    installer_invoice_amount: Money | None = None

    def asdict(self, prefix: str):
        return {
            f'{prefix}_{k}': v
            for k, v in dict(
                cost_model=self.cost_model,
                cost_no_vat=self.cost_no_vat,
                ev_charger_cost_no_vat=self.cost_ev_charger_no_vat,
                ev_charger_price_no_vat=self.ev_charger_price_no_vat,
                battery_cost_no_vat=self.cost_battery_no_vat,
                pv_cost_no_vat=self.cost_pv_no_vat,
                price_no_vat=self.gross_price_no_vat,
                pv_price_no_vat=self.pv_price_no_vat,
                battery_price_no_vat=self.battery_price_no_vat,
                markup_no_vat=self.markup_no_vat,
                partner_margin_no_vat=self.partner_margin_no_vat,
                battery_leasing_num_terms=self.battery_leasing_num_terms,
                battery_leasing_interest_basis_points=self.battery_leasing_interest_basis_points,
                pv_leasing_num_terms=self.pv_leasing_num_terms,
                pv_leasing_interest_basis_points=self.pv_leasing_interest_basis_points,
                pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat=self.pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat,
                battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat=self.battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat,
                pv_buyout_price=self.normalized_pv_buyout_price,
                battery_buyout_price=self.normalized_battery_buyout_price,
                total_buyout_price=self.normalized_buyout_price,
                discounted_leasing_months=self.discounted_leasing_months,
                total_monthly_no_vat=self.total_monthly_no_vat,
            ).items()
        }

    @classmethod
    def get_shopping_cart_entry(cls, shopping_cart: ShoppingCart | None) -> _PriceAndCostEntry:
        from cloud.shoppingcart.product_tree.enums import ProductCategory as ShoppingCartProductCategory

        if not shopping_cart:
            return _PriceAndCostEntry()

        zero = Money(0, shopping_cart.cost.currency)
        buy_now_tree = shopping_cart.get_product_tree(main_purchase_model=PurchaseModel.BUY_NOW)

        (gross_price_no_vat, pv_price_no_vat, battery_price_no_vat, ev_charger_price_no_vat) = (
            get_gross_prices(
                buy_now_tree,
                node_types=[
                    ShoppingCartProductCategory.ALL,
                    ShoppingCartProductCategory.PV,
                    ShoppingCartProductCategory.BATTERY,
                    ShoppingCartProductCategory.EV_CHARGER,
                ],
                with_vat=False,
                default_value=zero,
            )
        )

        buy_out_tree = shopping_cart.get_product_tree(
            main_purchase_model=PurchaseModel.LEASING, is_buyout=True
        )

        (normalized_total_buyout_price, normalized_pv_buyout_price, normalized_battery_buyout_price) = (
            get_gross_prices(
                buy_out_tree,
                node_types=[
                    ShoppingCartProductCategory.ALL,
                    ShoppingCartProductCategory.PV,
                    ShoppingCartProductCategory.BATTERY,
                ],
                with_vat=False,
                default_value=zero,
            )
        )

        discounted_leasing_months = 0
        if (
            cart_mod := buy_out_tree.root_node.data.free_months_modification
        ) and cart_mod.num_terms_affected is not None:
            discounted_leasing_months = cart_mod.num_terms_affected

        effective_cm = shopping_cart.cost.cost_model.get_effective_model()
        spec = shopping_cart.old_spec

        def otovo_cost(node: ProductNode) -> Money:
            nodes = [buy_now_tree.get_node(nid) for nid in buy_now_tree.expand_tree(node.identifier)]
            cost_items = [node.data.cost_item for node in nodes if node.data.cost_item]
            extra_items = [node.data.extra_item for node in nodes if node.data.extra_item]
            cost_item_cost = [ci.get_otovo_cost(effective_cm, spec) for ci in cost_items]
            extra_item_cost = [item.total_cost for item in extra_items]
            return money.force_money_sum(
                chain.from_iterable((cost_item_cost, extra_item_cost)), currency=zero.currency
            )

        cost_pv_no_vat = otovo_cost(buy_now_tree.get_pv_node())
        cost_battery_no_vat = otovo_cost(buy_now_tree.get_battery_node())
        cost_ev_charger_no_vat = otovo_cost(buy_now_tree.get_ev_charger_node())
        cost_no_vat = otovo_cost(buy_now_tree.root_node)
        assert cost_no_vat == money.force_money_sum(
            (cost_pv_no_vat, cost_battery_no_vat, cost_ev_charger_no_vat), currency=zero.currency
        )

        pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat = zero
        battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat = zero
        total_monthly_no_vat = zero
        if PurchaseModel.LEASING in shopping_cart.business_unit.config.purchase_models:
            repayment_plans = {plan.main_hardware_type: plan for plan in build_repayment_plans(shopping_cart)}

            def get_first_non_zero(plan: RepaymentPlan) -> Money:
                return next(
                    (term.amount_excl_vat for term in plan.plan if term.amount_excl_vat.amount > 0), zero
                )

            if pv_repayment_plan := repayment_plans.get(MainHardwareType.PV_SYSTEM):
                pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat = get_first_non_zero(pv_repayment_plan)
            if battery_repayment_plan := repayment_plans.get(MainHardwareType.BATTERY):
                battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat = get_first_non_zero(battery_repayment_plan)
            total_monthly_no_vat = pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat + battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat

        return _PriceAndCostEntry(
            cost_model=shopping_cart.cost.cost_model,
            pv_leasing_num_terms=shopping_cart.leasing_terms_pv.num_terms,
            pv_leasing_interest_basis_points=shopping_cart.leasing_terms_pv.basis_points,
            battery_leasing_num_terms=shopping_cart.leasing_terms_batteries.num_terms,
            battery_leasing_interest_basis_points=shopping_cart.leasing_terms_batteries.basis_points,
            gross_price_no_vat=gross_price_no_vat,
            pv_price_no_vat=pv_price_no_vat,
            battery_price_no_vat=battery_price_no_vat,
            ev_charger_price_no_vat=ev_charger_price_no_vat,
            markup_no_vat=buy_now_tree.root_node.total_base_markup_amount,
            normalized_buyout_price=normalized_total_buyout_price,
            normalized_pv_buyout_price=normalized_pv_buyout_price,
            normalized_battery_buyout_price=normalized_battery_buyout_price,
            discounted_leasing_months=discounted_leasing_months,
            cost_no_vat=cost_no_vat,
            cost_pv_no_vat=cost_pv_no_vat,
            cost_battery_no_vat=cost_battery_no_vat,
            cost_ev_charger_no_vat=cost_ev_charger_no_vat,
            installer_invoice_amount=shopping_cart.total_installer_cost,
            total_monthly_no_vat=total_monthly_no_vat,
            pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat=pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat,
            battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat=battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat,
            partner_margin_no_vat=None,
            cost_modification=None,
        )

    @classmethod
    def get_price_spec_entry(cls, project: Project, price_spec: PriceSpec | None) -> _PriceAndCostEntry:
        from cloud.products.enums import ProductCategory

        if not price_spec:
            return _PriceAndCostEntry()
        cost_model = price_spec.get_cost_model()
        if not cost_model:
            return _PriceAndCostEntry()

        hardware_selection_summary: HardwareSelectionSummary = get_hardware_selection_summary(price_spec)
        has_panels = hardware_selection_summary.has_panels
        has_batteries = hardware_selection_summary.has_batteries

        # Readjustment table for VAT hack reversal
        isb_fixup: dict[tuple[str, Country, Decimal | None, int | None], Decimal] = {
            ('pv', Country.PL, Decimal('1.08'), 810): Decimal('640.35'),
            ('battery', Country.PL, Decimal('1.08'), 810): Decimal('518.99'),
            ('pv', Country.PT, Decimal('1.06'), 996): Decimal('788.600'),
            ('pv', Country.PT, Decimal('1.06'), 1047): Decimal('835'),
            ('battery', Country.PT, Decimal('1.06'), 1075): Decimal('726.800'),
            ('battery', Country.PT, Decimal('1.06'), 1191): Decimal('835'),
            ('pv', Country.NL, Decimal(1), 1044): Decimal('776.350'),
            ('pv',



                Country.NL, Decimal(1), 1110): Decimal('835'),
        }
        # Readjust monthly prices for VAT hack in PL
        if pv_adj := isb_fixup.get(
            (
                'pv',
                project.address.country,
                price_spec.vat_multiplier,
                price_spec.leasing_interest_basis_points,
            )
        ):
            price_spec.leasing_interest_basis_points = pv_adj  # type: ignore
        if bat_adj := isb_fixup.get(
            (
                'battery',
                project.address.country,
                price_spec.vat_multiplier,
                price_spec.leasing_interest_basis_points_batteries,
            )
        ):
            price_spec.leasing_interest_basis_points_batteries = bat_adj  # type: ignore

        if override_austian_zero_vat_campaign_vat_date(price_spec.discount) is not None:
            # For sold_* dims, where the sold contract is the source, we are severly underreporting revenue
            # becuase there is a 17% discount which is "actually" supposed to be accounted for by 0% VAT.
            # This fix removes the discount so that the "original" ex VAT values can be produced.
            price_spec.discount = None
            price_spec.gross_price = price_spec.base_price

        leasing_prices = price_spec.get_leasing_monthly_prices(
            with_vat=False, reprice_with_correct_vat=False, project=project
        )
        pv_leasing_monthly = leasing_prices and leasing_prices.pv_monthly_gross_price or None
        battery_leasing_monthly = leasing_prices and leasing_prices.battery_monthly_gross_price or None
        if pv_leasing_monthly or battery_leasing_monthly:
            total_leasing_monthly = (pv_leasing_monthly or Money(0, price_spec.gross_price.currency.code)) + (
                battery_leasing_monthly or Money(0, price_spec.gross_price.currency.code)
            )
        else:
            total_leasing_monthly = None

        battery_cost: Money | None = None
        battery_price: Money | None = None
        ev_charger_price: Money | None = None
        ev_charger_cost: Money | None = None
        pv_cost: Money | None = None
        pv_price: Money | None = None
        cost_modification: Money | None = price_spec.cost_modification

        price_items: PriceItems | None = get_price_items_for_price_spec(
            price_spec=price_spec,
            assign_at=project.installer_assigned_at,
            cost_model=cost_model,
            customer=project.customer,
            effective_cost_model=EffectiveCostModel.from_cost_model(cost_model),
            sale_at=price_spec.created_at,
            price_modification=price_spec.price_modification,
            target_battery_price=price_spec.gross_batteries_price,
            raise_price_errors=False,  # will enable logging the error in sentry
        )

        # NOTE: We changed this as a quick fix because the gross price without VAT coming from price items
        #       deviates from the sum of PV price and battery price.
        # TODO: Use the commented-out version again as soon as the price items sum is correct.
        # gross_price_no_vat = price_items.total_gross_price_no_vat_with_addons
        gross_price_no_vat = money.force_money_round(
            price_spec.gross_price / price_spec.get_vat_multiplier(project=project), 2
        )
        if price_items:
            battery_item = price_items.get_price_item_for_product(ProductCategory.BATTERY)
            pv_item = price_items.get_price_item_for_product(ProductCategory.PV_SYSTEM)
            ev_charger_item = price_items.get_price_item_for_product(ProductCategory.EV_CHARGER)

            cost_response = price_spec.get_cost_response_struct()
            pv_cost = pv_item.get_otovo_cost(cost_response) if pv_item else None
            battery_cost = battery_item.get_otovo_cost(cost_response) if battery_item else None
            ev_charger_cost = ev_charger_item.get_otovo_cost(cost_response) if ev_charger_item else None

            if price_spec.is_standalone_battery:
                if battery_cost and cost_modification:
                    battery_cost += cost_modification
            elif pv_cost and cost_modification:
                pv_cost += cost_modification

            battery_price = (
                (price_spec.gross_price_batteries / price_spec.get_vat_multiplier(project=project))
                if has_batteries
                else None
            )
            ev_charger_price = ev_charger_item.gross_price_no_vat if ev_charger_item else None

            if ev_charger_price:
                gross_price_no_vat += ev_charger_price

            pv_price = (
                (price_spec.gross_price_installation / price_spec.get_vat_multiplier(project=project))
                if has_panels
                else None
            )

        partner_margin_no_vat: Money | None = None
        if not project.is_leasing and (
            partner_margin_no_vat := price_spec.get_partner_margin(with_vat=False)
        ):
            # Platform Partner LEASING sales work on a commission system and the partner margin
            # is not applicable wrt financing. The system is sold to EDEA, not the partner,
            # as a regular O&O sale. Any added partner markup is included in EDEA's price
            if gross_price_no_vat:
                gross_price_no_vat -= partner_margin_no_vat

            if price_spec.is_standalone_battery:
                if battery_price:
                    battery_price -= partner_margin_no_vat
            elif pv_price:
                pv_price -= partner_margin_no_vat

        normalized_buyout_price: BuyoutPrice = price_spec.buyout_price(project=project)
        buyout_vat_multiplier = percent_to_multiplier(normalized_buyout_price.vat_percent)

        normalized_pv_buyout_price = normalized_buyout_price.pv_buyout_price / buyout_vat_multiplier
        normalized_battery_buyout_price = normalized_buyout_price.battery_buyout_price / buyout_vat_multiplier
        normalized_total_buyout_price = normalized_buyout_price.total_buyout_price / buyout_vat_multiplier

        discounted_leasing_months = None
        if price_spec.discount and price_spec.discount.type == DiscountType.FREE_MONTHS:
            discounted_leasing_months = int(price_spec.discount.amount)  # type: ignore

        installer_invoice_amount: Money = price_spec.get_installer_cost()

        return _PriceAndCostEntry(
            cost_model=price_spec.get_cost_model(),
            gross_price_no_vat=gross_price_no_vat,
            pv_price_no_vat=pv_price,
            battery_price_no_vat=battery_price,
            ev_charger_price_no_vat=ev_charger_price,
            cost_no_vat=price_spec.get_otovo_cost(),
            markup_no_vat=price_spec.get_markup_no_vat(),
            partner_margin_no_vat=partner_margin_no_vat,
            pv_leasing_num_terms=price_spec.leasing_num_terms if has_panels else None,
            pv_leasing_interest_basis_points=price_spec.leasing_interest_basis_points if has_panels else None,
            pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat=pv_leasing_monthly if has_panels else None,
            battery_leasing_num_terms=price_spec.leasing_num_terms_batteries if has_batteries else None,
            battery_leasing_interest_basis_points=price_spec.leasing_interest_basis_points_batteries
            if has_batteries
            else None,
            battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat=battery_leasing_monthly if has_batteries else None,
            cost_battery_no_vat=battery_cost,
            cost_pv_no_vat=pv_cost,
            cost_ev_charger_no_vat=ev_charger_cost,
            cost_modification=cost_modification,
            normalized_pv_buyout_price=normalized_pv_buyout_price,
            normalized_battery_buyout_price=normalized_battery_buyout_price,
            normalized_buyout_price=normalized_total_buyout_price,
            total_monthly_no_vat=total_leasing_monthly,
            discounted_leasing_months=discounted_leasing_months,
            installer_invoice_amount=installer_invoice_amount,
        )

    @classmethod
    def get_revenue_entry(cls, entry: _PriceAndCostEntry, purchase_model: PurchaseModel) -> _RevenueEntry:
        if not entry.gross_price_no_vat:
            return _RevenueEntry()
        sentinel = Money(0, entry.gross_price_no_vat.currency)
        pv_cogs = entry.cost_pv_no_vat or sentinel
        battery_cogs = entry.cost_battery_no_vat or sentinel
        addon_revenue = entry.ev_charger_price_no_vat or sentinel
        addon_cogs = entry.cost_ev_charger_no_vat or sentinel
        total_cogs = pv_cogs + battery_cogs + addon_cogs

        if purchase_model == PurchaseModel.LEASING:
            pv_calculator = get_leasing_revenue_calculator(MainHardwareType.PV_SYSTEM)
            pv_monthly = entry.pv_leasing_monthly_no_vat or sentinel
            pv_revenue = pv_calculator.revenue_generated(pv_monthly)
            pv_cogs_provisions = pv_calculator.operations_and_maintenance_provisions(pv_cogs)

            battery_calculator = get_leasing_revenue_calculator(MainHardwareType.BATTERY)
            battery_monthly = entry.battery_leasing_monthly_no_vat or sentinel
            battery_revenue = battery_calculator.revenue_generated(battery_monthly)
            battery_cogs_provisions = battery_calculator.operations_and_maintenance_provisions(battery_cogs)
        else:
            pv_revenue = entry.pv_price_no_vat or sentinel
            battery_revenue = entry.battery_price_no_vat or sentinel
            battery_cogs_provisions = sentinel
            pv_cogs_provisions = sentinel

        revenue_generated = addon_revenue + pv_revenue + battery_revenue
        operations_and_maintenance_provisions = pv_cogs_provisions + battery_cogs_provisions
        total_cogs_including_om_provisions = total_cogs + operations_and_maintenance_provisions
        gross_profit_generated = revenue_generated - total_cogs_including_om_provisions
        return _RevenueEntry(
            revenue_generated=money.force_money_round(revenue_generated, 2),
            operations_and_maintenance_provisions=money.force_money_round(
                operations_and_maintenance_provisions, 2
            ),
            total_cogs_including_om_provisions=money.force_money_round(total_cogs_including_om_provisions, 2),
            gross_profit_generated=money.force_money_round(gross_profit_generated, 2),
        )

    @staticmethod
    def _to_money_from_str(project: Project, value: str) -> Money | None:
        if 'kr' in value:
            value, _ = value.rsplit(' ', 1)
            value = value.replace(',', '')

        return Money(value, project.business_unit.config.currency)

    @classmethod
    def _get_assigned_data(cls, project: Project) -> tuple[_PriceAndCostEntry, _RevenueEntry]:
        if (
            not project.assigned_cost
            or 'spec' not in project.assigned_cost
            or not project.installer_assigned_at
        ):
            return _PriceAndCostEntry(), _RevenueEntry()

        # Find valid price at time of assign
        closest_contract = getattr(project, '_assigned_contract', None) or (
            project.contract_set.filter(accepted_at__lte=project.installer_assigned_at)
            .order_by('-accepted_at')
            .select_related('price_spec__business_unit')
            .first()
        )

        assigned_entry: _PriceAndCostEntry
        assigned_revenue_entry: _RevenueEntry

        if closest_contract:
            assigned_purchase_model = closest_contract.purchase_model
            if closest_contract.shopping_cart:
                assigned_entry = cls.get_shopping_cart_entry(closest_contract.shopping_cart)
            else:
                assigned_entry = cls.get_price_spec_entry(project, closest_contract.price_spec)
            assigned_revenue_entry = cls.get_revenue_entry(assigned_entry, assigned_purchase_model)
        else:
            assigned_entry = _PriceAndCostEntry()
            assigned_revenue_entry = _RevenueEntry()

        if total_cost_no_vat_data := project.assigned_cost.get('total_cost_no_vat'):
            assigned_entry.cost_no_vat = Money(**total_cost_no_vat_data)
        if cost_model_id := project.assigned_cost.get('cost_model_id'):
            assigned_entry.cost_model = UUID(cost_model_id)

        return assigned_entry, assigned_revenue_entry

    @classmethod
    def update_for_project(cls, project: Project) -> None:
        # We only support modern regular solar projects
        if not project.current_shopping_cart and not hasattr(project, 'project_change'):
            return None

        data = dict()

        if hasattr(project, 'last_purchase_model'):
            last_purchase_model = project.last_purchase_model
        else:
            assert project.contract
            last_purchase_model = project.contract.purchase_model

        last_signed_purchase_model = None
        if hasattr(project, 'last_signed_purchase_model'):
            last_signed_purchase_model = project.last_signed_purchase_model
        elif project.contract and (latest_signed := project.contract.get_latest_signed()):
            last_signed_purchase_model = latest_signed.purchase_model
        if last_signed_purchase_model:
            data['last_signed_purchase_model'] = last_signed_purchase_model

        last_accepted_purchase_model = None
        if hasattr(project, 'last_accepted_purchase_model'):
            last_accepted_purchase_model = project.last_accepted_purchase_model
        elif accepted_contract := project.get_latest_accepted_contract():
            last_accepted_purchase_model = accepted_contract.purchase_model
        if last_accepted_purchase_model:
            data['last_accepted_purchase_model'] = last_accepted_purchase_model

        if getattr(project, 'report_sold_cm', None) is None:
            first_contract = getattr(project, '_first_contract', None) or (
                project.contract_set.all()
                .order_by('created_at')
                .select_related('price_spec__business_unit', 'price_spec__base_markup', 'shopping_cart')
                .first()
            )
            first_contract = cast('Contract', first_contract)
            if not first_contract:
                return None

            sold_purchase_model = first_contract.purchase_model
            if first_contract.shopping_cart:
                sold_entry = cls.get_shopping_cart_entry(first_contract.shopping_cart)
            else:
                sold_entry = cls.get_price_spec_entry(project, first_contract.price_spec)
            sold_revenue_entry = cls.get_revenue_entry(sold_entry, sold_purchase_model)
            data.update(
                dict(
                    **sold_entry.asdict(prefix='sold'),
                    **sold_revenue_entry.asdict(prefix='sold'),
                    sold_purchase_model=sold_purchase_model,
                )
            )

        if project.current_shopping_cart:
            last_entry = cls.get_shopping_cart_entry(project.current_shopping_cart)
        else:
            last_entry = cls.get_price_spec_entry(project, project.project_change.current_price_spec)
        last_revenue_entry = cls.get_revenue_entry(last_entry, last_purchase_model)
        data.update(
            dict(
                **last_entry.asdict(prefix='last'),
                **last_revenue_entry.asdict(prefix='last'),
                last_purchase_model=last_purchase_model,
                last_cost_modification=last_entry.cost_modification,
                last_installer_invoice_amount=last_entry.installer_invoice_amount,
            )
        )

        assigned_entry, assigned_revenue_entry = cls._get_assigned_data(project)
        data.update(
            dict(
                **assigned_entry.asdict(prefix='assigned'),
                **assigned_revenue_entry.asdict(prefix='assigned'),
            )
        )

        # Most projects already exists, so just try updating first.
        updated = cls.objects.filter(project=project).update(**data | {'updated_at': timezone.now()})
        if not updated:
            cls.objects.create(**({'project': project} | data))

    @classmethod
    def get_csv(cls, country=None, countries=None, latest=None, earliest=None, status=None):
        output = io.StringIO()
        fieldnames = cls._get_csv_columns()
        writer = csv.DictWriter(output, fieldnames=fieldnames, delimiter=';')
        writer.writeheader()

        filter_kwargs = {}
        if country:
            filter_kwargs['country'] = country
        elif countries:
            filter_kwargs['country__in'] = countries
        if earliest:
            filter_kwargs['project__created_at__date__gte'] = earliest
        if latest:
            filter_kwargs['project__created_at__date__lte'] = latest

        rows = cls.objects.filter(**filter_kwargs).order_by('project_number').values(*fieldnames)
        for batch in batch_qs(rows):
            writer.writerows(batch)
        return output.getvalue()

        row, _ = cls.objects.get_or_create(project=project)

    @classmethod
    def update_bulk(cls, num_entries: int = 1000):
        dates = [
            DateType.CONSTRUCTION_START,
            DateType.CONSTRUCTION_END,
            DateType.GRID_OWNER_APPLICATION,
            DateType.GRID_OWNER_APPROVED,
            DateType.PANEL_INSTALLATION_START,
            DateType.PANEL_INSTALLATION_END,
            DateType.INVERTER_INSTALLATION,
            DateType.ELECTRICIAN_VISIT,
        ]
        contract_set = Prefetch(
            'contract_set',
            queryset=(
                Contract.objects.using(get_read_only_db_name())
                .select_related(
                    'price_spec', 'interest', 'interest__agent', 'shopping_cart', 'shopping_cart__cost'
                )
                .defer('sanity_context')
                .order_by('created_at')
            ),
        )
        installation = Prefetch(
            'installation',
            queryset=(
                Installation.objects.using(get_read_only_db_name())
                .prefetch_related('battery_set', 'inverter_set', 'smartmeter_set')
                .select_related('optimizer_model__manufacturer')
            ),
        )
        projects = (
            Project.objects.using(get_read_only_db_name())
            .filter(Q(project_change__isnull=False) | Q(current_shopping_cart__isnull=False))
            .select_related(
                'customer',
                'address',
                'installer',
                'agent',
                'project_change',
                'project_change__current_price_spec',
                'current_shopping_cart',
                'current_shopping_cart__cost',
                'grid_owner',
                'business_unit',
                'address__zip_code',
                'forecasting_row',
            )
            .prefetch_related(contract_set, installation)
            .annotate(is_new=Case(When(forecasting_row__isnull=False, then=1), default=0))
            .with_dates_annotated(*dates)
            .order_by('is_new', 'forecasting_row__updated_at')
        )[:num_entries]
        project_count = projects.count()

        logger.info(f'Creating forecasting report from {project_count} projects')
        for project in projects:
            try:
                cls.update_for_project(project)
            except Exception as ex:
                logger.info(f'ProjectForecasting: Unhandled exception for project {project.id}, ex: {ex}')
                continue

    @classmethod
    def _get_installer(cls, costmodel_id: uuid.UUID) -> Installer:
        if costmodel_id in COSTMODEL_TO_INSTALLER_CACHE:
            return COSTMODEL_TO_INSTALLER_CACHE[costmodel_id]
        installer = Installer.objects.filter(costmodel=costmodel_id).first()
        assert installer
        COSTMODEL_TO_INSTALLER_CACHE[costmodel_id] = installer
        return installer

    @staticmethod
    def _fmt(val):
        if val and isinstance(val, datetime):
            return val.date()
        if isinstance(val, Money):
            val = val.amount
        return str(val).replace('.', ',') if isinstance(val, (Decimal, float)) else val

    @classmethod
    def get_cost_price_margin(
        cls, purchase_model: PurchaseModel, source: PriceSpec | ShoppingCart | None
    ) -> tuple[int, int, int]:
        """
        Return cost, price, margin from the given source.
        """
        if not source:
            raise ValueError('Source is required')
        if isinstance(source, PriceSpec):
            cost = int(source.get_otovo_cost().amount)
            price = int(source.gross_price.amount)
            margin = int(source.get_otovo_margin().amount)
        elif isinstance(source, ShoppingCart):
            tree = source.get_product_tree(main_purchase_model=purchase_model)
            price = int(tree.root_node.total_gross_price.amount)
            margin = int(tree.otovo_margin.amount)
            cost = int(tree.total_cost.amount)
        else:
            raise ValueError(f'Unsupported source type: {type(source)}')
        return cost, price, margin

    # This is a pretty complec method that can use some breaking up
    @classmethod
    def _update_row(cls, row: ProjectForecastingReport, project: Project):  # noqa: C901
        if not project.contract_set.exists():
            return row

        # We really don't care about these anymore.
        # Pre 2017 projects are not supported
        if not project.current_shopping_cart and not hasattr(project, 'project_change'):
            return row

        first_contract: Contract | None = project.contract_set.first()
        last_contract: Contract | None = project.contract_set.last()
        assert first_contract
        assert last_contract

        first_installation_spec = first_contract.installation_spec
        assert first_installation_spec
        last_installation_spec = last_contract.installation_spec
        assert last_installation_spec
        current_installation_spec = project.current_installation_spec
        assert current_installation_spec, 'No current installation spec'

        assert first_contract.price_spec or first_contract.shopping_cart

        first_cost, first_price, _first_margin = cls.get_cost_price_margin(
            first_contract.purchase_model, first_contract.price_spec or first_contract.shopping_cart
        )
        _last_cost, last_price, last_margin = cls.get_cost_price_margin(
            last_contract.purchase_model, last_contract.price_spec or last_contract.shopping_cart
        )
        _current_cost, current_price, current_margin = cls.get_cost_price_margin(
            last_contract.purchase_model,
            project.current_shopping_cart or project.project_change.current_price_spec,
        )

        if project.current_shopping_cart:
            current_cost_model = project.current_shopping_cart.cost.cost_model
        else:
            current_cost_model = project.project_change.current_price_spec.get_cost_model()

        row.cost_model_publish_date = (
            current_cost_model.published_at.date().isoformat() if current_cost_model.published_at else ''
        )

        current_hardware = current_installation_spec.get_equipment_summary(False)
        row.num_buildings = len(current_installation_spec.buildings)
        row.num_surfaces = current_installation_spec.get_total_num_surfaces()

        row.num_panels, row.num_standard_panels, row.num_premium_panels, _ = cls.get_panel_counts(
            current_installation_spec
        )

        row.num_optimizers = current_installation_spec.get_total_num_optimizers()
        row.num_inverters = current_installation_spec.get_total_num_inverters()
        row.num_batteries = current_installation_spec.total_num_batteries

        row.system_power = cls._fmt(current_installation_spec.get_system_power())

        costs = get_cost_responses(
            spec=current_installation_spec,
            address=project.address,
            assign_at=timezone.now(),
            hardware_orders=project.hardware_orders,
        )
        costs = sorted(costs, key=lambda x: x.total_cost_no_vat)

        if costs:
            lowest_cost_responce = costs[0]
            lowest_cost_installer = cls._get_installer(lowest_cost_responce.costmodel_id)
            row.lowest_cost_installer = lowest_cost_installer.name
            row.lowest_cost = cls._fmt(lowest_cost_responce.total_cost_no_vat.amount)
            for c in costs[1:]:
                if (cost_installer := cls._get_installer(c.costmodel_id)) != lowest_cost_installer:
                    row.second_lowest_cost_installer = cost_installer.name
                    row.second_lowest_cost = cls._fmt(c.total_cost_no_vat.amount)
                    break

        if project.abandoned_at:
            if not row.abandoned_date and project.abandoned_at:
                row.abandoned_date = cls._fmt(project.abandoned_at)
        else:
            row.abandoned_date = None

        if first_contract and first_contract.interest and first_contract.interest.agent:
            row.sales_agent = str(first_contract.interest.agent)
        row.install_agent = project.agent and str(project.agent) or ''

        if project.assigned_cost and 'total_cost_no_vat' in project.assigned_cost:
            row.assigned_installer_cost = cls._fmt(
                Decimal(project.assigned_cost['total_cost_no_vat']['amount'])
            )

        row.customer_price = cls._fmt(last_price)
        # If we're not pending a contract update, use the current price spec for
        # calculating the margins, since the cost might have changed using
        # cost_modifier but no new contract has been created.
        if row.customer_price == current_price:
            row.otovo_margin = cls._fmt(current_margin)
        else:
            row.otovo_margin = cls._fmt(last_margin)

        row.last_roofings = ','.join(
            str(r.name)
            for r in set(
                last_contract.shopping_cart.get_mounting_surfaces()
                if last_contract.shopping_cart
                else (last_contract.price_spec.get_mounting_surfaces() if last_contract.price_spec else [])
                or []
            )
        )

        if last_contract.price_spec:
            try:
                repriced_price_spec = get_lowest_price_for_spec(
                    spec=None,
                    old_spec=last_installation_spec,
                    save_price_to_db=False,
                    business_unit=project.business_unit,
                    address=project.address,
                    sale_at=timezone.now(),
                    hardware_orders=last_contract.price_spec.get_cost_response_struct().hardware_orders,
                    raise_price_errors=True,
                    is_organization_customer=project.customer.is_organization_customer,
                    leasing_terms=last_contract.price_spec.central_business_config.leasing_terms,
                    leasing_terms_batteries=last_contract.price_spec.central_business_config.leasing_terms_batteries,
                )
                if repriced_price_spec:
                    row.price_now = cls._fmt(repriced_price_spec.gross_price)
                    row.cost_now = cls._fmt(repriced_price_spec.get_otovo_cost())
            except Exception as e:
                logger.warning(
                    f'ProjectForecasting: Failed to get price_now for project: {project.id} with exception {e}'
                )

        row.price_at_first_sale = cls._fmt(first_price)
        row.cost_at_first_sale = cls._fmt(first_cost)

        cm_at_first_sale: CostModel | None
        if first_contract.shopping_cart:
            cm_at_first_sale = first_contract.shopping_cart.cost.cost_model
        else:
            cm_at_first_sale = (
                first_contract.price_spec.get_cost_model() if first_contract.price_spec else None
            )

        row.cost_model_at_first_sale = cm_at_first_sale and cm_at_first_sale.name or None
        row.installer_at_first_sale = cm_at_first_sale and cm_at_first_sale.installer.name or None
        row.system_power_at_first_sale = cls._fmt(first_installation_spec.get_system_power())

        row.total_num_panels_at_first_sale = cls._fmt(first_installation_spec.get_total_num_panels())
        row.optimizers_at_first_sale = cls._fmt(first_installation_spec.get_total_num_optimizers())
        row.inverters_at_first_sale = cls._fmt(first_installation_spec.get_total_num_inverters())
        row.batteries_at_first_sale = cls._fmt(first_installation_spec.total_num_batteries)

        first_hardware = first_installation_spec.get_equipment_summary(False)
        template = '{manufacturer_name} {model_name}'
        row.first_sale_inverter_models = ', '.join(template.format(**i) for i in first_hardware['inverters'])
        row.first_sale_battery_models = ', '.join(template.format(**i) for i in first_hardware['batteries'])
        row.first_sale_smart_meter_models = ', '.join(
            template.format(**i) for i in first_hardware['smart_meters']
        )
        if first_panels := first_hardware['panels']:
            row.first_sale_panel_models = template.format(**first_panels)

        if current_hardware:
            row.last_inverter_models = ', '.join(template.format(**i) for i in current_hardware['inverters'])
            row.last_battery_models = ', '.join(template.format(**i) for i in current_hardware['batteries'])
            row.last_smart_meter_models = ', '.join(
                template.format(**i) for i in current_hardware['smart_meters']
            )
            if current_panels := current_hardware['panels']:
                row.last_panel_models = template.format(**current_panels)

        if installation := project.installation:
            install_template = '{model__manufacturer__name} {model__name}'
            value_list = ('model__name', 'model__manufacturer__name')
            row.installed_battery_models = ', '.join(
                install_template.format(**b) for b in installation.battery_set.values(*value_list)
            )
            row.installed_inverter_models = ', '.join(
                install_template.format(**b) for b in installation.inverter_set.values(*value_list)
            )
            row.installed_smart_meter_models = ', '.join(
                install_template.format(**b) for b in installation.smartmeter_set.values(*value_list)
            )
            if panels := installation.panel_model:
                row.installed_panel_models = f'{panels.manufacturer.name} {panels.name}'

            if optimizer := installation.optimizer_model:
                row.installed_optimizer_model = f'{optimizer.manufacturer.name} {optimizer.name}'

        row.project_number = project.project_number
        row.workstation = 'Abandoned' if project.abandoned_at else project.workstation
        row.customer = project.customer.name
        row.assigned_installer = project.installer and project.installer.name or ''
        if grid_owner := project.get_grid_owner():
            row.grid_owner = grid_owner.name

        row.address = str(project.address)
        if municipality_name := project.address.municipality_name:
            row.municipality = municipality_name
            if county_name := project.address.county_name:
                row.county = county_name
        row.country = project.address.country

        row.completed_at = cls._fmt(project.completed_at)
        row.contract_date = cls._fmt(first_contract.signed_at)
        row.assigned_date = cls._fmt(project.installer_assigned_at)
        row.construction_start_date = cls._fmt(project.construction_start_date)
        row.construction_end_date = cls._fmt(project.construction_end_date)
        row.grid_application_date = cls._fmt(project.grid_owner_application_date)
        row.grid_owner_approved_date = cls._fmt(project.grid_owner_approved_date)
        row.panel_installation_start_date = cls._fmt(project.panel_installation_start_date)
        row.panel_installation_end_date = cls._fmt(project.panel_installation_end_date)
        row.inverter_installation_date = cls._fmt(project.inverter_installation_date)
        row.electrician_visit_date = cls._fmt(project.electrician_visit_date)

        if project.bookable_at:
            row.bookable_date = cls._fmt(project.bookable_at)

        row.purchase_model = project.purchase_model
        try:
            row.save()
        except Exception as e:
            logger.warning(
                f'ProjectForecasting: Failed to save row for project: {project.id} with exception {e}'
            )
        return row

    @classmethod
    def get_panel_counts(cls, spec: Spec) -> tuple[int, int, int, int]:
        """Return total number of panels, standard panels, premium panels and tier3 panels."""
        panel_count = spec.get_total_num_panels()
        match spec.get_product_classification():
            case ProductClassification.STANDARD:
                return panel_count, panel_count, 0, 0
            case ProductClassification.PREMIUM:
                return panel_count, 0, panel_count, 0
            case ProductClassification.TIER3:
                return panel_count, 0, 0, panel_count
            case _:
                return panel_count, 0, 0, 0
```

```py cloud/cloud/reporting/tasks.py
import gc
import os

from django.conf import settings
from django.db.models import F, OuterRef, Prefetch, Q

from celery.utils.log import get_task_logger

from cloud.celery import app
from cloud.contracts.models.contract import Contract
from cloud.installercost.models import CostModel
from cloud.planning.models.project import Project
from cloud.reporting.models import ProjectFinancialReport, ProjectForecastingReport
from cloud.shoppingcart.models import ShoppingCartBaseMarkup

logger = get_task_logger(__name__)

SKIP_TASKS = os.getenv('DISABLE_PERFORMANCE_DATA_TASKS') == 'true' or settings.ENVIRONMENT != 'production'


@app.task()
def update_project_financial_report_minimal(project_ids):
    is_shoppingcart = bool(
        Project.objects.filter(id=project_ids[0]).values_list('current_shopping_cart_id', flat=True).first()
    )

    logger.info(
        'Updating financial report for %d projects, is_shoppingcart=%s',
        len(project_ids),
        str(is_shoppingcart),
    )

    # Since we're about to do a pretty memory-intensive work,
    # let's clear out anything thats just pending to be cleaned up
    # by the garbage collector.
    collected_garbage = gc.collect()
    logger.debug('Garbage collected %d objects before run', collected_garbage)

    logger.debug('Pre-warming cached for reporting in bulk')

    projects = Project.objects

    if is_shoppingcart:
        projects = projects.with_shoppingcart_prefetched().filter(current_shopping_cart__isnull=False)
    else:
        projects = (
            projects.filter(project_change__isnull=False)
            .select_related(
                'address',
                'business_unit',
                'customer',
                'project_change__current_price_spec__business_unit',
                'project_change__current_price_spec__base_markup',
                'project_change__current_price_spec__partner_markup',
                'project_change__current_price_spec__discount',
            )
            .prefetch_related(
                Prefetch(
                    'contract_set',
                    queryset=Contract.project_objects.select_related('price_spec__business_unit'),
                    to_attr='active_contracts',
                ),
            )
        )
    projects = projects.annotate(
        report_sold_cm=F('financial_report__sold_cost_model_id'),
        last_purchase_model=(
            Contract.objects.filter(project=OuterRef('id'))
            .order_by('-created_at')
            .values('purchase_model')[:1]
        ),
        last_accepted_purchase_model=(
            Contract.objects.filter(project=OuterRef('id'), accepted_at__isnull=False)
            .order_by('-created_at')
            .values('purchase_model')[:1]
        ),
        last_signed_purchase_model=(
            Contract.objects.filter(project=OuterRef('id'), signed_at__isnull=False)
            .order_by('-created_at')
            .values('purchase_model')[:1]
        ),
        assigned_contract=(
            Contract.objects.filter(
                project=OuterRef('id'), accepted_at__lte=OuterRef('installer_assigned_at')
            )
            .order_by('-accepted_at')
            .values('id')[:1]
        ),
    )

    projects = projects.filter(
        Q(financial_report__isnull=True) | Q(financial_report__closed_at__isnull=True),
        Q(id__in=project_ids),
    )

    # Joining is the first and assigned contract with nested select related is about impossible
    # to do via the ORM, so we prefetch these manually here and attach them to their
    # respective projects.
    assigned_contracts = Contract.objects.filter(id__in=projects.values_list('assigned_contract'))
    if is_shoppingcart:
        assigned_contracts = assigned_contracts.select_related(
            'shopping_cart__business_unit',
            'shopping_cart__cost__installer',
            'shopping_cart__cost__cost_model',
            'shopping_cart__shopping_cart_base_markup',
        ).prefetch_related(
            'shopping_cart__extra_items',
            'shopping_cart__cart_modifications',
            'shopping_cart__cost__costitem_set',
        )
    else:
        assigned_contracts = assigned_contracts.select_related(
            'price_spec__business_unit',
            'price_spec__base_markup',
            'price_spec__partner_markup',
            'price_spec__discount',
        )
    assigned_contracts = (
        assigned_contracts.distinct('project_id')
        .order_by('project_id', 'created_at')
        .in_bulk(field_name='project_id')
    )

    missing_first_contract_entry = projects.filter(report_sold_cm__isnull=True).values_list('id', flat=True)

    first_contracts = Contract.objects.filter(project_id__in=missing_first_contract_entry)
    if is_shoppingcart:
        first_contracts = first_contracts.select_related(
            'shopping_cart__business_unit',
            'shopping_cart__cost__installer',
            'shopping_cart__cost__cost_model',
            'shopping_cart__shopping_cart_base_markup',
        ).prefetch_related(
            'shopping_cart__extra_items',
            'shopping_cart__cart_modifications',
            'shopping_cart__cost__costitem_set',
        )
    else:
        first_contracts = first_contracts.select_related(
            'price_spec__business_unit',
            'price_spec__base_markup',
            'price_spec__partner_markup',
            'price_spec__discount',
        )
    first_contracts = (
        first_contracts.distinct('project_id')
        .order_by('project_id', 'created_at')
        .in_bulk(field_name='project_id')
    )

    for project in projects:
        if contract := first_contracts.get(project.id):
            project._first_contract = contract
            assert (
                contract.project_id == project.id
            ), f'Attempted to assign contract {contract.id} to wrong project'
        if contract := assigned_contracts.get(project.id):
            project._assigned_contract = contract
            assert (
                contract.project_id == project.id
            ), f'Attempted to assign contract {contract.id} to wrong project'

    # We need to create EffectiveCostModel for all touched cost models during the reporting,
    # so we prefill the cache in bulk before starting the reporting.
    if is_shoppingcart:
        costmodel_ids = set(projects.values_list('current_shopping_cart__cost__cost_model_id', flat=True))
        shopping_cart_markups = set(
            projects.values_list('current_shopping_cart__shopping_cart_base_markup_id', flat=True)
        )
        ShoppingCartBaseMarkup.set_many_for_ids(shopping_cart_markups)
    else:
        costmodel_ids = set(
            projects.values_list('project_change__current_price_spec__cost_response__costmodel_id', flat=True)
        )
    # Prime cache
    CostModel.get_cached_by_ids(costmodel_ids)

    logger.info('Performing financial reporting')
    for project in projects:
        try:
            ProjectFinancialReport.update_for_project(project)
        except Exception as e:
            logger.exception('Failing to generate financial report for project %s', project.id, exc_info=e)

    # These should go out of scope and be garbage collected quite soon automatically,
    # but since this is quite a bit of memory, we expedite the process a bit.
    del projects
    del first_contracts
    del costmodel_ids
    collected_garbage = gc.collect()
    logger.debug('Garbage collected %d objects after run', collected_garbage)


@app.task()
def update_project_financial_reports_minimal():
    if SKIP_TASKS:
        logger.info('Skipping update_project_financial_reports_minimal')
        return

    filters = [Q(current_shopping_cart__isnull=False), Q(project_change__isnull=False)]
    for f in filters:
        batch = []
```
